title: Hermes Agent Self-Evolution Cover v2
brief: WeChat headline cover (2.35:1 ultra-wide, 1080x460). Subject: Hermes Agent, the self-evolving AI agent framework. Key visual elements: a CADUCEUS symbol (herald staff with two snakes wrapped around it, the classic symbol of Hermes the messenger god) at center, rendered with geometric precision and pixel-art circuit-board trace lines radiating outward — warm yellow/gold/terracotta metallic gradient on a matte black background. The caduceus should feel like it's generating branching recursive growth patterns, symbolizing self-evolution. Style: retro-futuristic, pixel-grid geometry, no organic curves, purely geometric. Leave generous negative space at top for title overlay. No text, no labels, no arrows.
